subject: A racing speedboat or hydrofoil vehicle cutting through coastal waters near towering red cliffs, with a rider visible at the helm
description: A sleek racing watercraft skims along bright turquoise-blue water at high speed, throwing a churning white wake behind it. The boat is dark with cyan accents and carries a single rider hunched forward at the controls. Behind and around the vessel rise dramatic rust-red sandstone cliffs that frame the scene, their craggy faces lit warmly by an afternoon sun. The sky above is hazy gold and pale blue with wispy clouds. The composition reads as a high-energy action shot — a single moment of velocity captured between cliffs and water.
foreground: racing watercraft with rider cutting across blue water, white wake spray
background: towering rust-red sandstone cliffs under a hazy gold sky with thin clouds
emotion: focused intensity, forward drive, the thrill of pursuit
